examples: The Alvin Ailey American Dance Theatre was formed in the 1950s and quickly established itself as a leading exponent of progressive choreography and contemporary dance.
Listen to part of a lecture in a choreography class.
The choreography of Eric Hawkins is considered radical by ballet audiences.
In "Pippin, " the thrilling moments of Bob Fosse's choreography look tame compared with the aerial stunts.
You really have to be good at choreography to prepare three meals a day.
